title: Calopogonium galactioides
taxonomy: Calopogonium galactioides is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to Central and South America and is also known as the 'creeping rubyscale' due to its vibrant red color. This plant belongs to the genus Calopogonium, which comprises several species of climbing or twining plants. Calopogonium galactioides is often used as an ornamental plant due to its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. Its classification is further supported by its placement in the tribe Diocleae within the subfamily Faboideae.
